00 00 00 00 01 00 FF FF 01 00 05 00 43 5A 6F 6E 65 CB C0 01 2D 5D C1 86 3F CB C0 01 2D 5D C1 96 3F 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 3D 0D 18 24 7D C2 3F 98 50 C1 E1 05 11 B1 3F 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 10 41 4D 45 06 00 00 00 43 4F 62 44 61 6F 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 03 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 FF FF 01 00 07 00 43 43 6F 75 72 62 65 CB C0 01 2D 5D C1 86 3F CB C0 01 2D 5D C1 96 3F 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
